headline: A Look At Revvity (RVTY) Valuation As Mixed Recent Returns Contrast With Undervaluation Narrative
summary: Revvity (RVTY) is drawing investor attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$93.96. Short term returns are mixed, with gains over the past week and month but a weaker performance over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Revvity. Viewed across longer periods, Revvity’s recent 4.95% 1 day share price return and 9.33% 1 month share price return contrast with a weaker 90 day share price return of a 16.02% decline.
